title: Buttery Toast
description: A simple and delicious breakfast or snack made with toasted bread and melted butter.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Toast the bread until it's lightly browned.
Add 1-2 tablespoons of butter to the pan and let it melt.
Place the toasted bread in the pan and let the butter melt on top.
Sprinkle a pinch of salt and a dash of vinegar (if using) on top of the butter.
